comments.LineComment: | This module provides the visual components for rendering product tours:
| All components are pure functions producing Halogen HTML.
| State is managed externally; these are view-only.
| renderTour :: forall w. Tour.TourState MyMsg -> HH.HTML w (Tour.TourMsg MyMsg)

value.value: absolute z-50 w-80 max-w-sm rounded-lg border bg-popover p-4 text-popover-foreground shadow-lg
inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium
inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium
inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium
